mapper.sql: user_id, login_name, user_name, `password`, `valid`, limited_ip, expired_time, last_change_pwd_time, last_login_time, limit_multi_login, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into test_user
user_id,
login_name,
user_name,
`password`,
`valid`,
limited_ip,
expired_time,
last_change_pwd_time,
last_login_time,
limit_multi_login,
create_time,
update_time,
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{loginName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{valid,jdbcType=CHAR},

mapper.update:
update test_user
login_name = #{loginName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`valid` = #{valid,jdbcType=CHAR},
limited_ip = #{limitedIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expired_time = #{expiredTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_change_pwd_time = #{lastChangePwdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
limit_multi_login = #{limitMultiLogin,jdbcType=CHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update test_user set login_name = #{loginName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `valid` = #{valid,jdbcType=CHAR}, limited_ip = #{limitedIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expired_time = #{expiredTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_change_pwd_time = #{lastChangePwdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, limit_multi_login = #{limitMultiLogin,jdbcType=CHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
